pos_sentences: Our teaching staff is the best for our course because they have completed their PhDs.

Our college provided internships for electric power generation and thermal power stations in Kavali and Nellore. Yes, we had a very good experience with my college during the internship. No, our college doesnt provide any stipend.
The placement department in our college is the best among all the ones we have in our district.
It is a good opportunity for students who have problems in their houses. But I dont have any scholarship at this college.
We have 2 lab sessions in a week, and we have a great time in those sessions. However, there is no gain of knowledge in them.
We have PG students who are studying in the hostel. The food provided by the hostel is somewhat better.
According to my knowledge, it is the best place for studying B.Tech. However, the examination system must be changed for it to become the best college in our state.
neg_sentences: So, we have no experience in that field. My college is located in a small town called Kavali, but we are actively engaged in real-time projects.

Yes, scholarships are provided to merit students. Additionally, students who are unable to pay the college fees are provided with loans to pursue their studies. They are expected to repay the loan after completing their studies, without any pressure on them to do so.
Because our hostel fee is 55000, but they do not provide clean nature, and the food is very bad, and water management is also very poor.
There are no other bad remarks about my college and we have one special thing, which is the library.
